name: Chile and Cheese Appetizer Tart
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounces Old El Paso Chopped Green Chiles, drained
1 Cup Old El Paso Thick 'n Chunky Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow both crust pouches to stand at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F.
3. Unfold one crust onto an ungreased cookie sheet; remove plastic sheets and press out fold lines.
4. Sprinkle cheeses over the crust, within ½ inch of the edge. Sprinkle with green chiles.
5. Unfold remaining crust; remove plastic sheets and press out fold lines. Place it over the chiles.
6. Seal edges with a fork. Generously prick the top crust with a fork.
7. Sprinkle with chili powder.
8. Bake at 450°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Let stand 5 minutes.
9. Cut into wedges; serve with salsa.
